LanguageData.VME_LeatherApparel_Abhorrent.stages.0.de: I'm wearing clothing made with animal leather. Slaughtering an animal to use its skin as apparel is cruel and inhumane.
LanguageData.VME_LeatherApparel_Disliked.stages.0.des: I'm wearing clothing made with animal leather. Slaughtering an animal to use its skin should be avoided.
